title: 'Stop, stop, stop!': Cockpit audio captures final moments between pilot, co-pilot before Air Canada crash kills both
summary_full: An Air Canada Express plane crashed into a fire truck at LaGuardia Airport, killing the pilot and co-pilot. Cockpit audio reveals confused instructions and repeated warnings to a vehicle to stop moments before the collision. The incident forced the airport's closure and initiated investigations by aviation authorities.
